title: AL's Enderman Revamped
description: A pack that revamps Endermen and adds more variants!
body:
![Enderman Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abd49c901003397fdffaf36da4abb97cb0206ab8.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Endermen and adds more variants by changing the models and textures!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/I3XZ1XYm0rQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Features:**

*Revamped Enderman texture

*Enderlings in the End

*Enderall in Caves below Y=0

*Creaking-like Warped Forest Enderman

*Ethereal Soulsand Valley Enderman

*Whisperers in Jungles

*Wavewhisperers in Beaches and Oceans

*Custom sounds when using the ESF mod





**Renamable Enderman Skins/Variants:**

*Watchling

*Snareling

*Blastling

*Whisperer

*Wavewhisperer

*Enderall

*Icy Ender Creeper

*Slenderman

*Bleu Enderman

*Bleu_2ay

(The "Bleu" nametag variants are modelled and textured by [@Bleu_2ay_VT](https://x.com/Bleu_2ay) as a contributor)

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
